title: V_pid_reg3: LLR-008
statement: PID-регулятор должен обновлять интегральную составляющую суммой предыдущего значения, вклада Ki и коррекции анти-виндапа Kc.
acceptance: Trace-index pilot parses code markers, test cases and legacy result evidence for this requirement.
conditions: Synthetic V_pid_reg3 fixture is scanned by trace-index.
rationale: The fixture demonstrates external evidence traceability for PID control logic.
assumptions: Fixed-point multiplication is represented by a deterministic host stub in the fixture.
